data.title: Builders FirstSource reported $3.4 billion in net sales for Q4 2025, a 12.1% decrease due to market conditions.
data.description: In Irving, Texas, Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE: BLDR) released its fourth quarter results for the period ending December 31, 2025. During this quarter, they reported a 12.1% decrease in net sales, which amounted to $3.4 billion. This drop was mainly attributed to a less active construction market. The decrease in sales was driven by lower core organic net sales and deflation in commodity prices, though this was somewhat balanced by the positive impact of recent acquisitions. Gross profit for the quarter was $1.0 billion.

data.title: Steak ‘n Shake reports significant rise in sales post Bitcoin introduction, with $15M in Bitcoin reserves.
data.description: The national restaurant franchise, Steak ‘n Shake, reported that its innovative approach of allowing customers to trade burgers for Bitcoin over the past nine months has resulted in a notable boost in same-store sales. The company has successfully accumulated a $15 million reserve in Bitcoin as a result of this strategy.

data.description: In a recent report, it was stated that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the past week in the country. The total number of reported cases has jumped to over 50,000, with more than 1,000 new cases being confirmed daily. This surge has put a strain on the healthcare system, leading to a shortage of hospital beds and medical supplies. The authorities have urged the public to follow safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help contain the spread of the virus. Additionally, around 500 deaths have been recorded due to the virus in the same period, highlighting the severity of the situation.Officials are working on implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus and protect the population's health. It is crucial for everyone to remain vigilant and take necessary precautions to prevent further escalation of the crisis.

data.title: PurpleRidge launches Automated AWS Account Audit to combat 8-minute AI cloud attacks. Platform reveals Combined Risk Stories.
data.description: Located in Santa Clara, California, PurpleRidge, utilizing RidgeBot® from Ridge Security, has introduced the Automated AWS Account Audit. This new offering addresses security concerns revealed by recent studies indicating that malicious actors can infiltrate a cloud system in as little as eight minutes. With the rise of LLMs being utilized by hackers to search for vulnerable credentials in public S3 buckets, PurpleRidge's solution goes beyond traditional checklists by identifying "Combined Risk Stories." By pinpointing isolated vulnerabilities, the platform aims to strengthen security measures in response to evolving threats in the digital landscape.

data.title: Tolion Health AI forms advisory board with experts in Alzheimer's, brain health, AI to enhance scientific capabilities.
data.description: Tolion Health AI, a digital health company specializing in personalized AI solutions for brain health and longevity, has established its Scientific Advisory Board (SAB) based in Boston. The board comprises leading experts in neuroscience, neurology, Alzheimer’s disease research, preventive medicine, and AI. This move aims to enhance Tolion's scientific prowess and provide guidance for its future endeavors. The SAB's formation underscores Tolion's commitment to advancing innovative solutions in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Monroe Capital funds acquisition of Excel Testing by Fusion Capital. Excel offers testing programs since 2002.
data.description: In Chicago, Monroe Capital LLC facilitated a senior credit facility to aid in the acquisition of Excel Testing and Engineering Holdings LLC by Fusion Capital Partners. The financing was part of a joint lead arrangement by Monroe. Excel, established in 2002, provides various testing services such as emissions, battery, durability, and specialty testing throughout the entire product lifespan. These services include pre-production validation and compliance during product usage. Fusion Capital Partners, a private equity sponsor, led the acquisition.

data.title: Allegion Q4 earnings: Missed EPS by -2.51% at $1.94 vs est. $1.99. Revenue rose by $87.40M YoY.
data.description: Allegion (NYSE: ALLE) announced its Q4 earnings on Tuesday, February 17, 2026 at 06:00 AM. In the report, it was revealed that the company missed estimated earnings by -2.51%, showing an EPS of $1.94 compared to the estimated $1.99. Additionally, there was an increase in revenue by $87.40 million from the previous year's same period. Looking at the historical earnings summary, in the last quarter the company surpassed EPS expectations... For further details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
